notes: France are near full-strength but carry concerns over Marcus Thuram (calf, out), N'Golo Kanté (physical discomfort, doubtful), and William Saliba (back issue, expected to start). Sweden are significantly weakened: key centre-back Isak Hien is ruled out for the rest of the tournament with a thigh injury, forcing a defensive reshuffle with Lindelöf dropping back and teenager Bergvall stepping into midfield.
home_scorers: Kylian Mbappé (captain and leading striker, 4 goals in group stage)
Ousmane Dembélé (joint top scorer with 4 goals, including a hat-trick vs Norway)
Michael Olise (advanced playmaker, overloads half-spaces, set-piece threat)
away_scorers: Viktor Gyökeres (target man, hold-up play, primary striker)
Alexander Isak (counter-attack runner, 3 assists in tournament, pace threat in b
Anthony Elanga (wide forward, likely to carry ball on the break)
